subject: Gaming
title: FIFA Ultimate Team: A Money Machine
description: One-minute skill: FIFA Ultimate Team: A Money Machine.

hook.text: FIFA Ultimate Team earns EA over $1 billion per year. Players buy random card packs hoping for star players.

buildup.text: FUT lets players build teams by opening packs. Star players are extremely rare, encouraging repeat purchases.

discovery.text: The system uses variable rewards—the same psychology as slot machines—to drive spending.

twist.text: Children are the most vulnerable audience. Some parents reported kids spending thousands on FUT packs.

climax.text: Regulators worldwide are debating whether FUT packs constitute gambling. The answer could reshape gaming.

punchline.text: One billion per year from card packs. The debate: is this gambling?

quiz.question: How much revenue does FIFA Ultimate Team generate annually for EA?
